title: Tixapalooza Farewell Event
creator: Roblox Corporation
description: Tixapalooza was a month-long farewell event held before the discontinuation of Tickets (Tix). From March 15 to April 13, 2016, Roblox released exclusive Ticket-themed commemorative items that allowed users to spend their remaining Tix balances before the currency was removed.

title: Play as Guest Popup
creator: Roblox Corporation
description: Interface and access-layer artifact showing the “Play as Guest” entry system used on Roblox between 2012 and 2017. This popup allowed unregistered users to enter games without creating an account and functioned as a key onboarding gateway into the platform.This artifact represents the guest access layer of the Roblox platform, where identity was temporarily assigned at login rather than permanently registered.

title: Guest Nametag
creator: Roblox Corporation
description: In-game nametag used to identify unregistered players on Roblox servers. Guests appeared under the generic label “Guest” followed by a randomly assigned number, making them visually distinct from registered users. This nametag functioned as a temporary identity system, reinforcing Guest status as a non-persistent account type within gameplay environments.

title: Guest Safe Chat Interface
creator: Roblox Corporation
description: Screenshot showing the communication restrictions applied to Guest accounts on Roblox in November 2013. Guests were limited to Super Safe Chat, a menu-based communication system that prevented free-text messaging and restricted interactions to pre-approved phrases. This artifact documents Roblox's moderation and safety policies for unregistered users, illustrating how communication was controlled within the platform's guest access system.
subject: guest accounts;safe chat;Super Safe Chat;communication;moderation;child safety;user restrictions;unregistered users
rights: Screenshot from public forum use for educational and archival purposes

title: Removal of Guest Mode Announcement
description: Official announcement published on the Roblox Developer Forum documenting the discontinuation of Guest Mode on both desktop and mobile platforms. Roblox stated that requiring users to create registered accounts would improve player retention, social interaction, game engagement, and monetization opportunities for developers. This artifact marks the end of guest access on Roblox and reflects the platform's transition toward account-based participation and community engagement.
subject: guest accounts;feature removal;platform policy;user registration;developer relations;community management;account systems
rights: Screenshot from public forum use for educational and archival purposes
